description: Managed Desk B discovery universe. Edit status to include/exclude names without touching strategy seeds. Discovery uses status=active by default.
selection_notes: PCS with long/non-collapse bias wants names that trend or mean-revert without structural collapse.
Higher IV → richer credits, but also fatter tails; dual-cost holdout is the filter, not vibes.
Options liquidity (volume/OI) matters for live; proxy sim still runs thin names.
Capital fit: sleeve max_loss ~$300. Wide strikes on $200–$1000 names often need width=1–2 or fail gates.
SPCX is not a standard listed ticker (SpaceX private). Use TSLA/RKLB/ASTS proxies if space theme wanted.

prefer: liquid equity or ETF options (tight spreads live)
defined-risk 1–3 wide PCS can fit max_loss_budget_usd
not pure binary event junk as the whole book

tags.ai_growth: AI / semis / software growth — long-bias PCS theme
tags.experimental: try for sim; easy to demote

INTC.notes: Top F2 so far; semi + turnaround narrative

AAPL.notes: Liquid; lower premium than pure high-vol names

F.notes: Cheap underlyings fit $300 ML easily; low F2 so far — demote if stays barren

SOFI.notes: High vol fintech; demote if no train pass after denser grid

TSLL.notes: 2x Tesla product; Desk A familiarity; use sparingly for live

TSLA.notes: Add wave: liquid options, high premium; watch width/capital fit

NVDA.notes: Add wave: AI leader; high price → prefer narrow width in grid

AMD.notes: Add wave: semi peer to NVDA/INTC

META.notes: Add wave: mega-cap AI spend + liquid options

MSFT.notes: Add wave: lower vol than NVDA; solid long-bias PCS candidate

QQQ.notes: Add wave: nasdaq beta; capital fit easier than single mega names sometimes

SPY.notes: Best liquidity; often fails $300 ML on typical widths — enable when width/grid allows

RKLB.notes: Space theme proxy (SpaceX private). Promote to active if you want space beta.
